name: Sprinter
description: Move faster than normal by acting more frequently.

name: Heavy Footed
description: Move slower than normal.

name: Brawler
description: Hardened fighter with toughened hide and raw power. +2 Natural SP, +1 PH.

name: Roundhouse Kick
description: Strike all adjacent enemies in a single sweeping kick. Bound to K.

name: Flamethrower
description: Unleash a cone of fire in the direction you are facing. Bound to C.

name: Thick Skin
description: Years of hard living have left you with hide like leather. +2 Natural SP.

name: Noncombustible
description: Fire doesn't scare you. You take half damage from fire.

name: Acid Proof
description: Corrosive substances roll right off you. You take half damage from acid.

name: Hands Only
description: You fight best with nothing in your hands. Unarmed attacks deal 1d10 bludgeoning and cost half the normal energy.

name: Martial Artist
description: A sweeping roundhouse kick that strikes all adjacent enemies at once. Bound to R.

name: Brainy
description: Sharp mind, sharp instincts. +1 MA.

name: Nimble
description: You are light on your feet. +5 AG.

name: Small
description: You were practically born in the ducts. You move through maintenance tunnels at full speed.

name: Sharpshooter
description: You have a steady hand with ranged weapons. +5 CS.

name: Combat Specialist
description: Rigorous melee training pays off. +5 HTCS.

name: Ranged Combat Specialist
description: The time spent at the shooting range pays off. +5 CS.

name: Shove
description: Shove the entity in front of you one tile back. Bound to V.

name: Acid Spray
description: Unleash a cone of acid in the direction you are facing. Bound to C.

name: Poisonous Bite
description: Bite the enemy directly in front of you for 1d8 damage. On a hit, they must pass a Cool Check (DC 13) or become poisoned for 5 turns. Bound to B.

name: Deadshot
description: Surgical precision with a ranged weapon. Aimed shots gain an extra +10 CS, and targeted aimed shots hit the chosen body part 90% of the time.

name: Paralyzing Vinewhip
description: Lash out with a whipping vine for 1d12 bludgeoning damage. On a hit, the target must pass a Cool Check (DC 15) or become slowed for 4 turns. Bound to V.
